Collagen Peptides – Stronger Skin. Healthier You.
Restore your natural glow and support whole-body wellness with our premium Collagen Peptides formula. Made from high-quality marine or bovine collagen, this supplement delivers easily absorbable peptides that help maintain youthful skin, strong hair, healthy nails, and flexible joints—so you look and feel your best every day.
Why Collagen Matters
Collagen is the most abundant protein in the body, responsible for skin elasticity, joint strength, and connective tissue health. As we age, collagen production declines—leading to wrinkles, weaker hair, and joint stiffness. Supplementing with collagen peptides helps replenish what your body naturally loses.Key Ingredients
Marine/Bovine Collagen Peptides – Hydrolysed collagen for better absorption, supporting skin firmness, joint comfort, and hair & nail strength.
Benefits
Improves skin elasticity and hydration
Supports healthy hair growth and stronger nails
Promotes joint flexibility and bone strength
Helps reduce visible signs of ageing
Supports overall wellness and recovery
Recommended Dosage

Who Can Use It?
Ideal for men and women looking to improve skin health, strengthen hair and nails, support joint mobility, or maintain overall beauty and wellness.

Iron + Folic Acid – Stronger Blood. Stronger You.
Support healthy haemoglobin levels, boost natural energy, and nourish your body with a gentle yet powerful iron formula. This advanced blend combines Iron Bisglycinate, Folic Acid, and Vitamin B12 to help reduce fatigue, support red blood cell production, and maintain overall vitality—making it ideal for women, vegetarians, and individuals with low iron levels.

Why This Formula Matters
Iron deficiency is one of the most common nutritional gaps, especially among women. Low iron can lead to tiredness, dizziness, poor concentration, and weak immunity. Our carefully designed formula provides highly absorbable Iron Bisglycinate, which is gentle on the stomach and better utilised by the body.
Combined with Folic Acid and Vitamin B12, this supplement supports healthy blood formation, energy metabolism, and nervous system health.

Key Benefits
✔ Helps increase haemoglobin levels
✔ Reduces fatigue and weakness
✔ Supports red blood cell production
✔ Gentle on stomach & better absorption
✔ Supports energy, focus, and immunity
✔ Ideal for women, vegetarians, and busy lifestyles

Key Ingredients & Their Role
Iron Bisglycinate
A highly absorbable, stomach-friendly form of iron that helps improve haemoglobin levels and oxygen transport in the body.
Folic Acid (Vitamin B9)
Essential for red blood cell formation, cell growth, and women’s reproductive health.
Vitamin B12
Supports energy production, brain function, and healthy nerve cells. Helps prevent B12 deficiency common in vegetarian diets.

Who Should Take It
Women with low haemoglobin levels
Individuals experiencing fatigue or weakness
Vegetarians or those with low B12 intake
Women during the menstrual cycle or pregnancy planning (consult a doctor)
Anyone needing daily iron support

How to Use:
Dosage: Once daily after meals, or as directed by a healthcare professional.
For best absorption, take with water and avoid tea/coffee immediately after.
